prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: line/load reversed on GFCI. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 210.12.
title: Fault diagnosis: GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting (service call)
